languages.text: "Ты говоришь иначе, чем прочие техножрецы — менее механистично".
"Your speech differs from that of other Tech-Priests — it is less mechanistic."
languages.original_text: "Ты говоришь иначе, чем прочие техножрецы — менее механистично".

traits.locale_text: "Your speech differs from that of other Tech-Priests — it is less mechanistic."
"Your speech differs from that of other Tech-Priests — it is less mechanistic."
"Your speech differs from that of other Tech-Priests — it is less mechanistic."

languages.text: «Su forma de hablar no es como la de los demás tecnosacerdotes, es menos mecánica».
languages.original_text: "Your speech differs from that of other Tech-Priests — it is less mechanistic."

traits.locale_text: «Su forma de hablar no es como la de los demás tecnosacerdotes, es menos mecánica».

languages.text: “你说话的方式跟其他技术神甫不太一样——没那么机械。”
languages.original_text: "Your speech differs from that of other Tech-Priests — it is less mechanistic."

traits.locale_text: “你说话的方式跟其他技术神甫不太一样——没那么机械。”

languages.text: « Vous ne vous exprimez pas comme les autres technoprêtres ; votre discours est moins mécanique. »
languages.original_text: "Your speech differs from that of other Tech-Priests — it is less mechanistic."

traits.locale_text: « Vous ne vous exprimez pas comme les autres technoprêtres ; votre discours est moins mécanique. »

languages.text: "Ihr sprecht anders als andere Techpriester — weniger mechanistisch."
languages.original_text: "Your speech differs from that of other Tech-Priests — it is less mechanistic."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr sprecht anders als andere Techpriester — weniger mechanistisch."

languages.text: "あなたの話し方は他のテックプリーストと違って、機械的ではない"
languages.original_text: "Your speech differs from that of other Tech-Priests — it is less mechanistic."

languages.text: "Konuşma tarzın, diğer Tekno Rahiplerinkinden farklı. Onlarınki sana kıyasla daha mekanik."
languages.original_text: "Your speech differs from that of other Tech-Priests — it is less mechanistic."

traits.locale_text: "Konuşma tarzın, diğer Tekno Rahiplerinkinden farklı. Onlarınki sana kıyasla daha mekanik."
